boundary: Provides rendered messages and audits; gate must not change message content.
Canonical UI remains dashboard; Telegram only summarizes.
Read-only artifact/view source; gate does not write SQL.
Bot dry-run may consume data later but does not depend on Telegram.
AI Analyst may explain messages later but cannot decide execution.
No MT5 path through Telegram sender gate.
Only study/manual context if enabled; never filter/signal.
